---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 提出新想法或改进建议 / Suggest a new idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 功能描述 / Feature Description

<!-- 简要描述你想要的功能 -->
<!-- Briefly describe the feature you want -->

## 🤔 问题背景 / Problem Statement

<!-- 
描述你遇到的问题或痛点。
这个功能要解决什么问题？

Describe the problem or pain point you're facing.
What problem does this feature solve?
-->

## 🎯 建议方案 / Proposed Solution

<!-- 
描述你希望的解决方案。
这个功能应该如何工作？

Describe your proposed solution.
How should this feature work?
-->

## 🔄 替代方案 / Alternatives Considered

<!-- 
描述你考虑过的其他解决方案。
为什么选择了当前的方案？

Describe alternative solutions you've considered.
Why is the current approach preferred?
-->

## 📊 使用场景 / Use Cases

<!-- 
描述这个功能会在什么场景下使用。
谁会使用这个功能？

Describe the scenarios where this feature would be used.
Who would use this feature?
-->

1. **场景 1 / Scenario 1**: 
2. **场景 2 / Scenario 2**: 
3. **场景 3 / Scenario 3**: 

## 🎨 界面示例 / UI Examples (可选 / Optional)

<!-- 
如果有界面相关的功能，可以添加草图或描述。
If this is UI-related, add sketches or descriptions.
-->

## 📋 优先级 / Priority

<!-- 你认为这个功能的重要程度 / How important do you think this feature is? -->

- [ ] 低 / Low - 锦上添花 Nice to have
- [ ] 中 / Medium - 比较重要 Important
- [ ] 高 / High - 急需解决 Critical

## 📝 补充信息 / Additional Context

<!-- 任何其他相关的信息或想法 -->
<!-- Any other relevant information or ideas -->

---

## 检查清单 / Checklist

<!-- 在提交前，请确认以下内容 / Before submitting, please confirm: -->

- [ ] 我已经搜索过现有 Issue，确认这个功能未被建议过
      I have searched existing issues and confirmed this feature hasn't been suggested
- [ ] 我已经尽可能详细地描述了这个功能
      I have described this feature in as much detail as possible
- [ ] 我理解这个功能可能需要时间来实现
      I understand this feature may take time to implement
